subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath revealed the verses and made manifest the clear tokens whilst the people were immersed in doubt and dissension. Say: Arise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات اذ کان الناس فی مریه و شقاق قل قوموا عن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @development of capacity and readiness, @suffering and imprisonment, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
